# Calendar Feature Shadow Spec

> Calendar View - Monthly grid visualization of financial activities

**Status:** In Progress
**Generated by:** spec-lead + @pseudo-worker

---

## Context Imports

```sudolang
import("specs/ARCHITECTURE.md")
import("specs/DB_DESIGN.md")
import("specs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md")
import("specs/FEATURES.md")
import("specs/DEPENDENCIES.md")
```

---

## Architecture

```sudolang
// Package-by-Feature Structure
// src/commonMain/kotlin/com/budgetcalendar/features/calendar/
// ├── domain/
// │   ├── model/           # CalendarDay, CalendarEvent, DaySummary, CalendarMonth
// │   └── usecase/
// │       ├── BuildCalendarMonthUseCase.kt
// │       ├── CalculateDaySummaryUseCase.kt
// │       ├── GetMonthTransactionsUseCase.kt
// │       └── CalculateMonthProjectionUseCase.kt   ← NEW
// └── presentation/
//     ├── CalendarViewModel.kt
//     ├── CalendarUiState.kt
//     └── components/
//         ├── CalendarGrid.kt
//         ├── CalendarDayCell.kt
//         ├── MonthNavigationHeader.kt      ← UPDATED layout
//         ├── EndOfMonthProjectionPill.kt   ← NEW
//         └── DayTransactionList.kt

// Calendar derives all data from transactions — no data layer of its own.
```

---

## Data Model

```sudolang
// Domain Models
interface CalendarDay {
  date: LocalDate;
  isCurrentMonth: Boolean;
  isToday: Boolean;
  isSelected: Boolean;
  dailySummary: DaySummary?;
}

interface DaySummary {
  totalIncome: Long;      // In cents
  totalExpenses: Long;    // In cents (absolute value)
  netAmount: Long;        // totalIncome - totalExpenses (can be negative)
  transactionCount: Int;
  hasPending: Boolean;
  hasOverdue: Boolean;
  hasConfirmed: Boolean;
}

interface CalendarMonth {
  yearMonth: YearMonth;
  days: List<CalendarDay>;
  transactionsByDate: Map<LocalDate, List<Transaction>>;
}

interface CalendarEvent {
  date: LocalDate;
  transaction: Transaction;
  eventType: CalendarEventType;
}

enum CalendarEventType {
  PENDING_INCOME
  PENDING_EXPENSE
  CONFIRMED_INCOME
  CONFIRMED_EXPENSE
  OVERDUE
}

// UI State Model
interface CalendarUiState {
  currentMonth: YearMonth;
  selectedDate: LocalDate;
  calendarMonth: CalendarMonth?;
  selectedDayTransactions: List<Transaction>;
  accountNamesById: Map<Long, String>;
  endOfMonthProjection: Long;     // Month-scoped available-to-spend in cents
  isLoading: Boolean;
  error: String?;
}
```

---

## Constraints

```sudolang
// Screen Layout
Constraint: CalendarScreen does NOT show a page header, search bar, segmented control, or Safe to Spend card
Constraint: The screen starts directly with MonthNavigationHeader — no title above it

// Month Navigation Header
Constraint: Month title (e.g. "February 2026") is left-aligned, bold (32pt, Outfit font)
Constraint: Navigation arrows (< >) are right-aligned, side by side
Constraint: Uses CalendarHeader design component (cWjai) from design system

// End of Month Projection Pill
Constraint: Shown between MonthNavigationHeader and CalendarGrid
Constraint: Label: "End of Month Projection", value: formatted currency amount
Constraint: Uses CalendarMetrics design component (JFDlk) from design system
Constraint: Formula: sum(spending_pool_account_balances)
            + sum(PENDING income transactions where date <= lastDayOfCurrentMonth)
            - sum(PENDING expense transactions where date <= lastDayOfCurrentMonth)
            + sum(OVERDUE income transactions where date <= lastDayOfCurrentMonth)
            - sum(OVERDUE expense transactions where date <= lastDayOfCurrentMonth)
            (only non-sandbox, only spending pool accounts)
Constraint: A bill due in a future month does NOT reduce the current month's projection

// Calendar Grid
Constraint: Calendar displays month grid with 7 columns (Sunday to Saturday)
Constraint: Each day cell shows: date number, daily net change (+income, -expenses)
Constraint: Visual indicators: dot for pending, red dot for overdue, checkmark for confirmed
Constraint: Tapping a day opens transaction list for that date below the grid
Constraint: Month navigation via left/right arrows or swipe gesture (drag > 70dp)
Constraint: Current day is highlighted with distinct background (bg-dark, text-inverted)
Constraint: Days from adjacent months are shown at 40% opacity
Constraint: Empty days show "—"

// Transaction Section Header
Constraint: Section header below the grid reads "Today · {MMM d}" when selectedDate == today
Constraint: When a different date is selected, reads "{DayOfWeek} · {MMM d}" (e.g. "Monday · Feb 3")
Constraint: Format the date using device local timezone

// Calendar fetching
Constraint: Calendar fetches transactions for the visible month plus one month buffer
```

---

## Data Flow

```sudolang
// Load Month Flow
User ViewMonth |> CalendarViewModel.loadMonth(yearMonth)
  |> GetMonthTransactionsUseCase.execute(yearMonth)
  |> TransactionRepository.getByDateRange(startDate, endDate)
  |> GroupTransactionsByDate
  |> CalculateDaySummaries
  |> BuildCalendarMonth
  |> CalculateMonthProjectionUseCase.execute(yearMonth)
  |> Emit CalendarUiState

// Select Day Flow
User Tap Day |> CalendarViewModel.selectDate(date)
  |> Update CalendarUiState.selectedDate
  |> Update CalendarUiState.selectedDayTransactions from calendarMonth.transactionsByDate[date]
  |> Emit Updated State

// Navigate Month Flow
User Swipe/Arrow |> CalendarViewModel.navigateMonth(direction)
  |> LoadMonth(newYearMonth)
  |> CalculateMonthProjection(newYearMonth)
  |> Emit Updated State

// End of Month Projection Flow
CalculateMonthProjectionUseCase.execute(yearMonth)
  |> GetSpendingPoolBalanceUseCase → totalPoolBalance
  |> TransactionRepository.getPendingAndOverdueForMonth(startOfMonth, endOfMonth, spendingPoolAccountIds)
  |> Sum signed amounts (income positive, expense negative)
  |> projection = totalPoolBalance + signedSum
  |> Emit projection: Long
```

---

## Function Signatures

```sudolang
fn GetMonthTransactions(ctx: Context, yearMonth: YearMonth): Flow<List<Transaction>>
fn CalculateDailySummary(ctx: Context, date: LocalDate, transactions: List<Transaction>): DaySummary
fn BuildCalendarMonth(ctx: Context, yearMonth: YearMonth): Flow<CalendarMonth>
fn SelectDate(ctx: Context, date: LocalDate): Flow<List<Transaction>>
fn NavigateToMonth(ctx: Context, yearMonth: YearMonth): Flow<CalendarMonth>
fn CalculateMonthProjection(ctx: Context, yearMonth: YearMonth): Flow<Long>
```

## UI Components

```sudolang
// MonthNavigationHeader Props (UPDATED layout)
interface MonthNavigationHeaderProps {
  currentMonth: YearMonth;
  onPreviousMonth: () -> Unit;
  onNextMonth: () -> Unit;
}
// Layout: Row { title (weight=1, left-aligned) | [<] [>] (right-aligned) }
// Title style: 32pt, Bold (800), Outfit, text-primary
// Arrow buttons: 44x44dp minimum touch target
// Design component: cWjai (Calendar Header)

// EndOfMonthProjectionPill Props (NEW)
interface EndOfMonthProjectionPillProps {
  projectionAmount: Long;    // In cents
}
// Layout: Row { label (left) | formatted amount (right) }
// Background: bg-surface, radius-lg (12dp)
// Padding: 12dp vertical, 16dp horizontal
// Label: "End of Month Projection", 13pt, Medium, text-secondary, Inter
// Amount: formatted currency, 16pt, Bold (800), text-primary, Outfit
// Design component: JFDlk (Calendar Metrics)

// CalendarGrid Props (unchanged)
interface CalendarGridProps {
  days: List<CalendarDay>;
  onDateSelected: (LocalDate) -> Unit;
}

// CalendarDayCell Props (unchanged)
interface CalendarDayCellProps {
  day: CalendarDay;
  onTap: () -> Unit;
}

// DayTransactionSectionHeader Props (NEW — replaces static BcSectionHeader)
interface DayTransactionSectionHeaderProps {
  selectedDate: LocalDate;
  today: LocalDate;
}
// Renders: "Today · Feb 12" if selected == today, else "Monday · Feb 3"
// Style: 20pt, Bold (800), text-primary, Outfit — using TransactionHeader component (oMq1b)

// DayTransactionList Props (unchanged)
interface DayTransactionListProps {
  transactions: List<Transaction>;
  accountNameProvider: (Long) -> String;
  onTransactionTap: (Transaction) -> Unit;
  onTransactionLongPress: (Transaction) -> Unit;
}
```

---

## SQLDelight Queries

```sudolang
// getPendingAndOverdueForMonth :many
// Returns all pending and overdue transactions on spending pool accounts
// within the given month range (for EndOfMonthProjection)
SELECT t.*
FROM transactions t
JOIN accounts a ON t.account_id = a.id
WHERE t.status IN ('pending', 'overdue')
AND t.date <= :endOfMonthMillis
AND t.date >= :startOfMonthMillis  -- optional: exclude past months
AND a.is_in_spending_pool = 1
AND t.is_sandbox = 0;

// NOTE: The above query intentionally uses date range instead of just endOfMonth
// to avoid double-counting past months' overdue items already reflected in balance.
// The projection formula handles this at the use case level.
```

---

## Dependencies

```sudolang
// External Dependencies
Dependency: kotlinx-datetime (0.5.0) - LocalDate, YearMonth
Dependency: koin (3.5.3) - DI
Dependency: kotlinx-coroutines (1.7.3) - Flow

// Internal Dependencies
Dependency: features/transactions - Query transactions by date range
Dependency: features/accounts - Account names in transaction details, spending pool balances
Dependency: features/budget - GetSpendingPoolBalance (reuse if available, else query directly)
```

---

## Edge Cases

| Case | Condition | Handling |
|------|-----------|----------|
| Month with no transactions | All days have no transactions | Show empty calendar with "—" in cells, projection = pool balance |
| Future month projection | User navigates to future month | Project using scheduled transactions for that month |
| Projection goes negative | Scheduled expenses exceed pool balance | Display ₱0 with error color on projection pill |
| Very long transaction list | > 20 transactions on a single day | Scroll within DayTransactionList; no "View all" truncation needed initially |
| Timezone differences | User in different timezone | Use device local timezone via TimeZone.currentSystemDefault() |
| Leap year February | February 29 on leap years | kotlinx-datetime handles this correctly |
| Month boundary navigation | Swipe from Jan to Dec | Handle year rollover via YearMonth.plusMonths() |
